summary: AI_OS shows a reference-only signal path, validates it locally, and previews a paper route without external execution.

workflow_steps.label: TradingView Signal Reference
workflow_steps.detail: Reference label only. No platform connection.

workflow_steps.label: Latency Check
workflow_steps.detail: Latency must be reviewed before paper route confidence increases.

workflow_steps.label: Clock Skew Check
workflow_steps.detail: Clock skew remains a review gate.

workflow_steps.label: Regime Check
workflow_steps.detail: Regime label stays local and paper-only.

workflow_steps.label: Risk Gate
workflow_steps.detail: Risk gate decides whether paper preview may continue.

workflow_steps.label: Strategy Ranking
workflow_steps.detail: Ranking remains review-gated while sample size and clock skew are unresolved.

workflow_steps.label: Paper Route Preview
workflow_steps.detail: Preview only. No real route activation.

workflow_steps.label: TradersPost Paper Route Reference
workflow_steps.detail: Reference label only. No account connection.

workflow_steps.label: Paper Result Review
workflow_steps.detail: Result review remains local and paper-only.

workflow_steps.label: Next Safe Action
workflow_steps.detail: Run the Phase 20 dry-run validator before any dashboard wiring.

next_safe_action: Validate the Phase 20 paper route workflow, then keep display mock-data only until a separate UI APPLY.
